info.title: claude-agent-server
info.description: Minimal HTTP wrapper around Claude Code using the stable Claude Agent SDK.

post.summary: Create a new Claude session by sending the first prompt

201.description: Created session and completed first run

post.summary: Send a prompt or inject a message into an active session
post.description: When the session is idle, starts a new query turn (batch or SSE). When the session has an active run, injects the message via streamInput and returns 202 — the agent's response events flow through the original SSE stream.

200.description: Completed prompt run or SSE stream

202.description: Message injected into active run — response events flow through the original SSE stream

post.summary: Fork a session into a new branch
Rewind file changes to a prior user message turn
post.description: Rolls back file changes to the state at a specific user message. Requires the session to have been started with options.enableFileCheckpointing=true and to have an active run.

get.summary: List slash commands supported by the active session
get.description: Returns slash commands available in the running Claude Code process. Requires an active run.

get.summary: List models available in the active session
get.description: Returns model info from the running Claude Code process. Requires an active run.

get.summary: List agents available in the active session
get.description: Returns agent info from the running Claude Code process. Requires an active run.

get.summary: Get context-window token usage for the active session
get.description: Returns a token usage breakdown by category. Requires an active run.

patch.summary: Hot-swap model on a running session
patch.description: Changes the model on an active session. Requires an active run.

patch.summary: Change permission mode on a running session
patch.description: Changes the permission mode on an active session. bypassPermissions is rejected with 400. Requires an active run.

400.description: Bad request (e.g. bypassPermissions is not allowed)

post.summary: Respond to a pending tool permission request
post.description: Resolves the paused canUseTool callback after a permission.requested SSE event. Returns 404 if no permission request is currently pending for the session.
Resolves the paused AskUserQuestion canUseTool callback after a question.asked SSE event. Returns 404 if no question is currently pending for the session.

answers.description: Map of question text to selected option label(s). For multi-select questions, pass an array of labels.

enableFileCheckpointing.description: Snapshot files before each tool execution, enabling POST /sessions/:id/rewind

TextBlockParam.description: A plain-text content block in a user message

ImageBlockParam.description: An image content block in a user message. Use base64 for inline data or url for remote images.

oneOf.description: Structured message with text and/or image blocks

StreamedMessageResponse.description: Returned when a message is injected into an active streaming session via streamInput. The agent's response flows through the original SSE stream.

priority.description: Message delivery priority when injecting into an active run. 'now' interrupts current work, 'next' queues after current turn, 'later' queues at the end.

SsePermissionRequestedEvent.description: Emitted when the agent needs user approval to use a tool. The SSE stream pauses until POST /sessions/{sessionId}/permissions/respond is called.

toolName.description: Name of the tool requesting permission (e.g. Bash, Write, Edit)

toolInput.description: Parameters the tool would be called with

toolUseId.description: Unique identifier for this tool call within the assistant message

blockedPath.description: File path that triggered the permission check, if applicable

decisionReason.description: Explanation of why this permission check was triggered

SseQuestionAskedEvent.description: Emitted when Claude calls AskUserQuestion. The SSE stream pauses until POST /sessions/{sessionId}/questions/respond is called with the user's answers.

questions.description: Questions Claude is asking. Each item has question, header, options (label+description), and multiSelect.

preview.description: Optional HTML/markdown preview (only present when toolConfig.askUserQuestion.previewFormat is set)

multiSelect.description: Whether multiple options can be selected

text.description: Concatenated text from all text content blocks

parentToolUseId.description: Set when this message is a sub-agent response triggered by a tool_use block

SseMessageDeltaEvent.description: Streaming delta — only emitted when includePartialMessages is true

event.description: Raw Anthropic stream event (content_block_start, content_block_delta, content_block_stop, message_delta, message_start, message_stop)

ttftMs.description: Time to first token in milliseconds

result.description: Final result text; populated when subtype is success

errors.description: Error objects; populated when subtype is not success

SseMessageRawEvent.description: Catch-all for unrecognized SDK message types

userMessageId.description: UUID of the user message to rewind to

Conflict.description: Session has no active run (start a prompt first)
